name: Spotify Web API (User)
description: Spotify Web API — user-scoped access to playback, library, playlists, recently-played, and top tracks. Authenticates via the Spotify Authorization Code + refresh flow: the daemon obtains and auto-refreshes the short-lived (1h) Bearer access token from the refresh token, so no static Authorization header is needed. Set SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID, SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET, and SPOTIFY_REFRESH_TOKEN (mint the refresh token once via the authorization-code flow). Includes a poll ingestor that fetches recently-played tracks — use poll_events to retrieve them.

testIngestor.description: Fetches one recently-played track to verify Spotify user API access

listenerConfig.name: Spotify Recently-Played Poll Listener
listenerConfig.description: Polls the authenticated user's recently-played tracks at a configurable interval.

fields.label: Poll Interval (ms)
fields.description: How often to check for recently-played tracks, in milliseconds. Spotify rate-limits, so keep this generous.

fields.label: Buffer Size
fields.description: Maximum number of events to keep in memory.

testConnection.description: Fetches the authenticated Spotify user profile
